achievements.title: The Condemned Giant
achievements.description: Defeat Giant Skeleton on the Minera Prison Island.
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Arthro Medal
achievements.description: Without taking damage or leaving the room defeat Arthroverta in Monastery and obtain Arthro Medal. [NG+ restricted, no hearts restore][Lv<=6]
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Skeleton Medal
achievements.description: Without taking damage or leaving the room defeat Giant Skeleton on the Minera Prison Island and obtain Skeleton Medal. [NG+ restricted, no hearts restore][Lv<=10]

achievements.title: Dracula Medal
achievements.description: Without taking damage defeat Dracula in Dracula's Castle. [No L. Eye of God, no R. Eye of Devil, no Queen of Hearts, no hearts restore][Lv<=50]
achievements.author: Shmelyoff
